stemHtml:
Two aircraft, one with a sharp wing profile (S), and the other with a thick profile (T), are flying through the same cloud with the same true airspeed. The cloud consists of small supercooled droplets.

Which of the following statements is most correct concerning ice accretion?

options.a: Neither of the aircraft accumulate ice due to the small size of droplets.
options.b: Aircraft T experiences more icing than S.
options.c: Aircraft S experiences more icing than T.
options.d: Aircraft S and T experience the same amount of icing.
